items.title: Under drone fire, exiled Kurds wait to confront Iranian regime
items.dek: A group of fighters based in Iraq say they are "ready to go home", as they face drone attacks from Tehran.
items.body: A group of fighters based in Iraq say they are "ready to go home", as they face drone attacks from Tehran.

items.title: Pink Floyd guitar sold for record-breaking $14.6m
items.dek: The guitar was used by David Gilmour on some of Pink Floyd's best-known albums, including Dark Side of the Moon.
items.body: The guitar was used by David Gilmour on some of Pink Floyd's best-known albums, including Dark Side of the Moon.
